# CWE-385 vulnerable — Covert Timing Channel
lang: go
file: CWE-385-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func CheckApiSecret(c *GinCtx, expected string) bool {
	provided := c.Request.Header.Get("X-Api-Secret")
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		return false
	}
	for i := 0; i < len(provided); i++ {
		if provided[i] != expected[i] {
			return false
		}
	}
	return true
}
